plan_audit.message: no plan on disk; all 2 task-body-declared file(s) present

completion_promises.criterion_text: _detect_git_changes() reports per-task deltas instead of cumulative changes
completion_promises.evidence: Added _baseline_state instance attribute to AgentInvoker. _snapshot_worktree_state() captures current modified/created file sets via _detect_git_changes() before each task invocation. Delta computation subtracts baseline from current state.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline snapshot captured before each task invocation
completion_promises.evidence: Updated invoke_player() to call _snapshot_worktree_state() before SDK invocation. Logs baseline counts for observability. Applied to both task-work and direct mode paths.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Delta computation: current state - baseline = per-task changes
completion_promises.evidence: Rewrote git-enrichment blocks in _create_player_report_from_task_work() and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() to compute delta_modified and delta_created by subtracting baseline from current git state. Replaced union logic with delta assignment.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both task-work and direct mode paths use delta logic
completion_promises.evidence: Both _create_player_report_from_task_work() and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() apply the same delta computation logic and observability logging.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Observability logging for baseline vs delta counts
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info() calls in both report creation methods to log baseline vs delta counts. Format: 'Git detection for {task_id}: baseline={len(baseline_modified)}+{len(baseline_created)}, delta={len(delta_modified)}+{len(delta_created)}'
